text.title: AI in PM (PM-Agile) — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the ai_pm_adoption_record produced by ai-in-project-management. Subagent must satisfy the schema below before returning.

antipattern.description: required fields silently omitted; selection / record returned with empty body
antipattern.reason: Records without the required fields fail audit and renewal review.

antipattern.description: numeric thresholds (price delta, ROI gate, integration score) replaced with prose ("looks great", "should be fine")
antipattern.reason: Prose thresholds cannot be compared across cycles; they decay to opinion.

antipattern.description: buyer / reviewer field set to a team or channel rather than a named person
antipattern.reason: Anonymous decisions rot; nobody is accountable when the decision is later questioned.

list.item: Round numeric values to 2 significant figures for the executive summary; preserve precision in the JSON body.
Translate buyer name to anonymised form for external audit copies; keep the full name in the internal record.

example.note: Empty object — every required field missing. Reject.

list.item: every required field is populated with a non-placeholder value
numeric thresholds are numbers, not prose
buyer / reviewer is a role:person, never a team
artefact validates against the JSON Schema above
